notes: Single self-contained HTML, Three.js 0.160 via ES module importmap CDN. Scene: foggy graveyard with displaced ground, glowing purple stage disc + pulsing yellow ring, 12 tombstones, 4 dead trees, full moon disc + additive halo sprite, 400-point starfield, 800 upward-drifting fog particles. Lighting: moon key (PCFSoft shadows, 2048 map), warm rim, purple backlight point, 4 colored sweeping spotlights. Post: ACES Filmic tone mapping, UnrealBloom, FXAA. Procedural characters built from primitives: Michael (black suit, red jacket, fedora, sunglasses, white socks, loafers), Pepe (green frog head with bulging eyes + wide torus mouth, blue pants), Donald (navy suit, white shirt, red tie, blonde combover), Elon (black jacket, dark tee, jeans, receding brown hair, slight smirk) + 8 backup zombies. Choreography: 32s loop with 7 pose keyframes (Idle, Zombie Stomp, Shuffle R, Shuffle L, Arms-Up Lunge, Claw Hands, Settle-Bow) interpolated with easeInOut, per-character time offset, arm/torso/head rotation + vertical bob. UI: Play/Pause, 4 camera modes (Front, Orbit, Low, Crane), Fog toggle, Spotlights toggle, animated spotlight targets, full window resize handling.
